code: import React,{useContext,useEffect}from'react';import{Container,Row,Col,Card,Button}from'react-bootstrap';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{AuthContext}from'../context/AuthContext';import styles from'./ProfileScreen.module.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProfileScreen=()=>{const{userInfo,logout}=useContext(AuthContext);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{if(!userInfo){navigate('/login');}},[userInfo,navigate]);if(!userInfo)return null;const handleLogout=()=>{logout();navigate('/login');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Container,{className:"py-5",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Row,{className:"justify-content-center",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Col,{md:8,lg:6,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Card,{className:styles.profileCard,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Card.Body,{className:"text-center p-5",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles.avatarLarge,children:userInfo.name?userInfo.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase():'U'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"mt-4 mb-1 font-bold",children:userInfo.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-muted mb-4",children:userInfo.email}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:styles.infoSection,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles.label,children:"ID de Usuario"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles.value,children:userInfo.id||'N/A'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles.label,children:"Rol / Permisos"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:styles.value,children:userInfo.isAdmin?'Administrador':'Cliente'})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{variant:"outline-danger",className:"w-100 py-2",onClick:handleLogout,children:"Cerrar Sesi\xF3n"})]})})})})});};export default ProfileScreen;
